headlines: Tether hires KPMG for first full audit of USDT reserves (moves toward U.S. expansion)
FTX Recovery Trust to begin $2.2B creditor distribution on March 31, 2026
Google quantum research tightens deadline for post‑quantum crypto upgrades
Morgan Stanley advances its direct spot Bitcoin ETF filing (MSBT) with SEC amendments
BlackRock updates filing for a staking‑enabled Ethereum ETF (staking fee disclosed in S‑1 amendment)

articles.title: Tether hires KPMG for first full audit of USDT (transparency push)
articles.summary: Tether said it engaged a Big‑Four auditor (reported as KPMG) to run the first full financial audit of USDT reserves — a major transparency step as stablecoin rules and U.S. expansion plans move forward. (reported March 24–27, 2026)

articles.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute about $2.2 billion to creditors on March 31, 2026
articles.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust announced a fourth distribution of roughly $2.2B to eligible creditors starting March 31, 2026 — a major liquidity milestone that may affect crypto markets and claimant payouts over the next few days.

articles.title: Google Research tightens estimated quantum threat to blockchain cryptography
articles.summary: New Google Research analyses (reported March 31, 2026) suggest far lower resource estimates for running Shor‑style attacks on ECDSA keys, accelerating calls for post‑quantum upgrades across Bitcoin, Ethereum and major chains — Google reportedly withheld full circuits and published a verification proof instead.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley advances direct spot Bitcoin ETF filing (MSBT)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed a second amendment to its spot Bitcoin ETF registration (ticker MSBT), adding operational details and signaling progress as big banks race to issue proprietary spot BTC funds to compete with incumbents.

articles.title: BlackRock updates S‑1 for staking‑enabled Ethereum ETF (staking fee disclosed)
articles.summary: BlackRock’s amended filings for a staking‑enabled spot Ethereum ETF outline staking economics and fees — a development that could widen regulated ETH access if the SEC approves staking inside an ETF.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation posts a large ETH staking deposit (network & staking signal)
articles.summary: Reports show the Ethereum Foundation or related activity moved a record‑sized ETH deposit into staking, reinforcing on‑chain demand for ETH and signalling continued institutional interest in staking returns.

articles.title: TokenInsight report: Bitget leads BTC and ETH futures liquidity in March
articles.summary: A TokenInsight liquidity report (published Mar 31, 2026) ranked Bitget top for BTC and ETH futures liquidity and execution quality — useful for traders watching venue risk and order execution.

articles.title: Grayscale launches Avalanche staking ETF (GAVA) on Nasdaq
articles.summary: Grayscale launched a Nasdaq-listed Avalanche staking ETF that can stake a portion of AVAX holdings for yield — another example of traditional asset managers packaging staking exposure for mainstream investors.
